addAccount.dialogSubtitle: Choose a method to bring an account into the list.
addAccount.reauthorizeDialogSubtitle: Replace the stored authorization for {{label}} with a fresh OAuth sign-in.
addAccount.launchingDetail: Opening browser and initializing listener. Please wait.
addAccount.watchingDetail: Complete login in your browser. The account will be imported and refreshed automatically (up to 10 minutes).
addAccount.oauthDescription: Authorize in the browser. Best for adding a new account or re-signing in.
addAccount.reauthorizeOauthDescription: Sign in again for this account in the browser and replace the stored OAuth authorization.
addAccount.oauthCallbackPlaceholder: Paste the full callback URL after the browser redirect
addAccount.currentDescription: Read the auth.json already signed in on this device and save it into the account pool.
addAccount.uploadDescription: Batch import auth.json files, exported accounts.json backups, or folders for migration, backup recovery, or consolidation.
addAccount.apiDescription: Save an API Key, Base URL, and model name. Switching applies the saved profile automatically.
addAccount.apiKeyPlaceholder: Only OpenAI-style API keys are supported, for example sk-...
addAccount.apiValidationTitle: A live connectivity check runs before saving
addAccount.apiValidationDescription: It validates the URL, key, model name, and /responses compatibility. You can still force-save if it fails.
addAccount.uploadQueueEmpty: No JSON files or folders selected yet.

accountCard.deleteConfirm: Click again to confirm deleting account

accountsGrid.emptyDescription: Click “Add account”. It appears automatically after authorization.

tray.noAccounts: No accounts yet. Add one in the main window first
tray.emptyAccounts: No accounts (add one in the main window)

apiProxy.title: API Proxy
apiProxy.hint: Automatically picks the best Codex account by remaining quota
apiProxy.chartDescription: Per-model persisted usage, refreshed every 2s while the proxy runs.
apiProxy.chartEmptyDescription: Send requests through the proxy to see model-level calls and token usage here.
apiProxy.sequentialFiveHourLimitDescription: Switch to the next account when 5h usage reaches this percent.
apiProxy.activeAccountEmptyDescription: The currently used account will appear after the first request
apiProxy.remoteDescription: Deploy and manage API proxy nodes on remote Linux servers over SSH.
apiProxy.remoteEmptyDescription: Add a Linux server first, then upload the proxyd binary and start it remotely.
apiProxy.remoteLogsEmpty: Logs have not been loaded yet
apiProxy.remoteGuideSetupDescription: Complete the name, host, auth method, and deploy directory. After that, clicking a history item will automatically detect whether the remote proxy is available.
apiProxy.remoteGuideDeployTitle: Next step: deploy the remote proxy
apiProxy.remoteGuideDeployDescription: This server is saved, but no remote proxy installation was detected yet. Deploying will upload the binary and install the service.
apiProxy.remoteGuideStartTitle: Next step: start the remote proxy
apiProxy.remoteGuideStartDescription: A remote service installation was detected, but the process is not running yet. Start it to copy the Base URL and API key for integration.
apiProxy.remoteGuideReadyDescription: The remote proxy is running. You can now copy the Base URL and API key directly, or open the logs to verify the service.
apiProxy.remoteDeployStageInstallingService: Installing and starting the remote service
apiProxy.cloudflaredDescription: Expose the current local proxy to the public internet for temporary testing or fixed-domain access.
apiProxy.startLocalProxyFirstDescription: cloudflared forwards the current local proxy port, so the local proxy must be running first.
apiProxy.installDescription: You can choose quick tunnel or named tunnel after installation completes.
apiProxy.quickModeDescription: Generates a temporary `*.trycloudflare.com` URL with no account required. The URL changes after restart.
apiProxy.namedModeDescription: Uses a Cloudflare API token and supports a custom hostname with a stable public URL.
apiProxy.quickNoteBody: The temporary URL changes after each restart. Cloudflare documents that Quick Tunnel does not support SSE.
apiProxy.apiTokenPlaceholder: Requires Tunnel Edit + DNS Edit permissions
apiProxy.publicStatusRunningDescription: cloudflared is exposing the local proxy to the public internet
apiProxy.publicStatusStoppedDescription: A public URL will be generated after start

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure startup, tray usage display mode, and theme.

launchAtStartup.label: Launch at startup
launchAtStartup.description: Automatically start Codex Tools when you log in.

launchCodexAfterSwitch.label: Launch Codex after switch
launchCodexAfterSwitch.description: Enabled by default. When disabled, only switch account without launching Codex.

smartSwitchIncludeApi.label: Include API in smart switch (when signed-in accounts run out of quota)

syncOpencode.label: Sync Opencode OpenAI auth
syncOpencode.description: Auto-detect opencode auth file and sync refresh/access on switch.

restartEditorsOnSwitch.label: Restart editors on switch (Codex plugin compatible)
restartEditorsOnSwitch.description: Disabled by default. When enabled, selected editors are force-restarted on account switch.

settings.noSupportedEditors: No supported editor detected for restart.

trayUsageDisplay.label: Status bar display
trayUsageDisplay.description: Choose whether tray menu shows used quota, remaining quota, or hides usage.

theme.label: Dark mode
theme.description: Use the switch to toggle light and dark theme.

updateDialog.title: New version {{version}} found
updateDialog.subtitle: Current version {{currentVersion}}. You can install now or handle it later.
updateDialog.statusReady: A new version is available. No automatic download has started.

notices.reloginRequired: Account {{label}} needs to sign in again. Automatic token refresh has been paused.
notices.foundNewVersion: New version {{version}} found (current {{currentVersion}}). Install when needed.
notices.addAccountSuccess: Authorization successful. Account was added and refreshed automatically.
notices.addAccountTimeout: Authorization timed out. Please click “Add account” again.
notices.currentAccountImportSuccess: Current device login imported and refreshed.
notices.currentAccountImportFailed: Failed to import current device login: {{error}}
notices.profileIntegrityWarning: {{count}} entries are missing independent auth/config files. Save or switch them once to rebuild.
notices.deleteConfirm: Click delete again to confirm removing {{label}}.
notices.switchedAndLaunchByCli: Account switched. The local Codex app was not detected; tried launching via `codex app`.
notices.noEditorRestarted: {{base}} No installed editor found for restart.
notices.smartSwitchNoTarget: No switchable account. Please add an account first.
notices.smartSwitchAlreadyBest: Current account already has the best remaining quota (1week first, then 5h).
notices.importFilesRequired: Select JSON files or a folder to import.
notices.importFailedNoValidJson: {{prefix}} failed: no valid JSON could be imported.
notices.remoteLogsFailed: Failed to read logs from remote server {{label}}: {{error}}
notices.pickIdentityFileFailed: Failed to choose local key file: {{error}}
notices.cloudflaredStartFailed: Failed to start cloudflared public access: {{error}}
notices.cloudflaredStopFailed: Failed to stop cloudflared public access: {{error}}
